title: Pipeline Escalation
description: Escalation artifact written when a pipeline stage encounters a blocking condition that requires human operator intervention. Variants are discriminated by halt_reason: 'unverified_fields' (requires resolved_fields + unresolved_fields), 'cache_hit_rate_unavailable' (requires signal + evolve_block_references), and prerequisite halt reasons ('missing_algorithm_summary', 'out_of_scope_patterns', 'missing_mapping_artifact', 'evolve_block_hash_mismatch') which require only the base fields (stage, halt_reason, details). The validator does not support oneOf; variant constraints are documented here and enforced by the pipeline orchestrator.

stage.description: Pipeline stage number that produced the escalation.

halt_reason.description: Discriminator for the escalation variant. When 'unverified_fields': resolved_fields and unresolved_fields are required. When 'cache_hit_rate_unavailable': signal and evolve_block_references are required. Prerequisite halt reasons ('missing_algorithm_summary', 'out_of_scope_patterns', 'missing_mapping_artifact', 'evolve_block_hash_mismatch') require only the base fields (stage, halt_reason, details).

details.description: Human-readable description of the blocking condition.

resolved_fields.description: Variant: unverified_fields. Metric field names that were successfully confirmed or mapped to alternatives.

unresolved_fields.description: Variant: unverified_fields. Metric field names that could not be confirmed or mapped.

signal.description: Variant: cache_hit_rate_unavailable. The signal that triggered the escalation (expected value: 'CacheHitRate').

evolve_block_references.description: Variant: cache_hit_rate_unavailable. References to where CacheHitRate is used in the EVOLVE-BLOCK scoring logic (e.g., penalty terms, composite signals).
